rationale: Both surface the same 3-4 material api-design defects (vacuous IsUnipotent under geomReduced, partial AlgPoints stub, True-only class fields, dead trivial' lemma) that any maintainer would insist on fixing before merge; Review 2's extras (naming/simp/rebinding/redundant instance) are minor or stylistic while its demands for extra characteristic lemmas on a predicate slated for removal add no value, so acting on either produces an essentially identical cleaned-up PR.
